title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF PASIG-NATIVIDAD ELEMENTARY   SCHOOL  IN  THE  MUNICIPALITY OF LAMBUNAO, PROVINCE OF ILOILO, TO FILEMON LEBERO MEMORIAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No.14017 / 65 OG No. 23, 5844 (June 9, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5319, June 15, 1968 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF PASIG-NATIVIDAD ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LAMBUNAO, PROVINCE OF ILOILO, TO FILEMON LEBERO MEMORIAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Pasig-Natividad Elementary School in the Municipality of Lambunao, Province of Iloilo is hereby changed to Filemon Lebero Memorial Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 15, 1968.
